VISION.core_statement: Self-improving multi-agent AI civilization that trades forex + BTCUSD with 24/7 signals, high winrate, continuous evolution
VISION.user_words_verbatim: ek owner ai agent banna hai jo khud naya naya ai agent unlimited puri ai ki civilization
VISION.primary_goal: Build AI civilization that gives trade signals 24/7, self-improves, achieves high winrate with high R:R
VISION.scope: ONLY day trading and intraday — no swing, no position trading

layers.layer_5: Owner Agent — meta-orchestrator, capital allocator, kill switch
layers.layer_4: Agent Factory — genetic evolution, weekly breeding
layers.layer_3: Specialist Agents — DynamicAgent with random DNA (NO pre-defined)
layers.layer_2: ML Brains — LSTM, Transformer, PPO RL, FinBERT, GNN
layers.layer_1: Data Pipeline — Binance, MT5, News, On-chain, Macro

MULTI_TIMEFRAME.confluence_principle: Trade only when 1m + 3m + 5m + 15m all align — historically 70-80% winrate

agent_types.dynamic: GenericAgent with RANDOM DNA — decides own strategy
agent_types.risk_manager: Safety gatekeeper — fixed DNA, validates every trade

WINRATE_STRATEGY.philosophy: Find setups where EXPECTED VALUE is positive enough to risk capital.
WINRATE_STRATEGY.high_conviction_filter: All agents consensus + multi-TF aligned → 75-85% effective winrate

GUARDRAILS_SACRED.DOCTRINE: These CANNOT be bypassed by any agent including Owner.
